title: What is Azure Bastion?
description: Azure Bastion is a fully managed service that provides secure and seamless RDP/SSH connectivity to virtual machines without exposing RDP/SSH ports externally.
summary: Azure Bastion is a fully managed PaaS service that provides secure and seamless RDP/SSH connectivity to your virtual machines directly over TLS from the Azure portal, or via the native SSH or RDP client already installed on your local computer. Azure Bastion is deployed directly in your virtual network and supports all VMs in the virtual network using private IP addresses. When you connect via Azure Bastion, your virtual machines don't need a public IP address, agent, or special client software.
